module_info.docstring:
Tests for GitPython resource cleanup and new helper functions.

These tests verify that:
1. _git_repo context manager properly cleans up resources
2. _open_repo_if_available closes repos on error paths
3. _collect_file_reservation_statuses properly cleans up repos

functions.name: test_git_repo_context_manager_normal_operation
functions.docstring: Test that _git_repo properly yields a working repo and closes it.

functions.name: test_git_repo_context_manager_closes_on_exception
functions.docstring: Test that _git_repo closes the repo even when exception is raised inside.

functions.name: test_git_repo_context_manager_handles_invalid_repo
functions.docstring: Test that _git_repo handles non-repo paths gracefully.

functions.name: test_open_repo_if_available_returns_none_for_non_repo
functions.docstring: Test that _open_repo_if_available returns None for non-git directories.

functions.name: test_open_repo_if_available_returns_none_for_none
functions.docstring: Test that _open_repo_if_available returns None when passed None.

functions.name: test_open_repo_if_available_returns_repo_for_valid_git
functions.docstring: Test that _open_repo_if_available returns valid repo for git directories.

functions.name: test_open_repo_if_available_closes_on_validation_failure
functions.docstring:
Test that _open_repo_if_available closes repo when validation fails.

This tests the bug fix where a repo opened but failing validation
(e.g., workspace not relative to repo root) would leak file handles.

functions.name: test_open_repo_if_available_closes_on_working_tree_exception
functions.docstring: Test that repo is closed if working_tree_dir access raises exception.

functions.name: test_file_reservation_statuses_cleanup_on_exception
functions.docstring: Test that _collect_file_reservation_statuses cleans up repos on exception.

functions.name: test_file_reservation_release_works
functions.docstring: Test that file reservations can be properly reserved and released.
